footer.desc: We bring digital ideas into material reality using our proprietary farm of dozens of 3D printers calibrated for speed and perfect precision.

hero.title: 3D Print Your Ideas
hero.subtitle: Transform a photo, drawing or custom frame from scratch into physical plastic

home.hw1_desc: Select from preset categories or use procedural forms editors.
home.hw2_desc: View the 3D model in your browser and adjust dimensions/textures.
home.hw3_desc: The order goes straight to our robots. It will arrive eco-packaged at your door.
home.catDesc: Choose from our collections or create your own design
home.prodDesc: Design combining digital precision with physical execution
home.usp1_desc: We use next-gen 3D printers for perfect millimeter details.
home.usp2_desc: Our DIY tool lets you control every aspect of your design.
home.usp3_desc: We use only high-quality, durable and eco-friendly polymers.
home.usp4_desc: Our products come ready to use, with perfectly adapted LED sources.

category.useCustomizer: Use our 3D configurator to personalize this product exactly how you want it.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.emptySub: Looks like you haven't added any products to your cart yet.
cart.secureCheckout: 100% Secure Checkout. Order completion is simulated.

lampi.desc: Procedural 3D printed lamps built from translucent custom PLA.

lithophanes.desc: Photographs brought to life sculpted in plastic. They glow depending on their thickness when backlit.

stringArt.desc: Mathematics woven with craftsmanship. Circular frames crafted by a continuous thread stretched between pins.

itemDiyLampa.name: DIY Parametric Lamp
itemDiyLampa.desc: Build your lamp from scratch by defining form, ridges structure and complex traits in the 3D designer.

itemLampaGeo.name: Geometric Lamp - Honeycomb
itemLampaGeo.desc: A lamp 3D printed from eco-friendly material that simulates a molecular organic structure.

itemLampaTwist.name: Spiral Twist Lamp
itemLampaTwist.desc: Clean form, perfect for filament bulbs. 180 degrees twist.

itemDiyLitho.name: Your Custom Lithophane
itemDiyLitho.desc: Upload a photo and we calculate the light level of each pixel, stack it 3D, and produce an eternal backlit frame.

itemLithoPalt.name: Flat Litho Frame 15x15
itemLithoPalt.desc: A flat square plate designed to be placed at windows.

itemArtFace.name: WireString Portrait
itemArtFace.desc: Over 3,000 algorithmic intersections of a single thread on a 70x70cm aluminum frame.

lamp.title: Parametric Sculpture
lamp.desc: Adjust mathematical parameters to generate the lamp.

lithophane.title: Lithophane Generator
lithophane.desc: Upload your image and calculate volumetric translucent 3D models live.
